V-M-079.scope: Premium Resend email template verification for verification/reset flows, logo rendering, text fallback, and token redaction.

commands.command: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_email_delivery.py -v

success-scenarios.scenario-1: Verification and reset HTML templates use premium Matrix style and visible KrotPN logo.
success-scenarios.scenario-2: Text fallback remains clean, readable, and independent of remote images.
success-scenarios.scenario-3: Tokens, provider API keys, and full one-time URLs remain redacted from logs and provider errors.

failure-scenarios.failure-1: Email template depends on images for meaning or includes logo URL noise in text fallback.
failure-scenarios.failure-2: Template changes alter Resend deployment/config semantics.
